title: Contact & Contribute
lede: This project welcomes questions from researchers, students, and residents; corrections to anything in the archive; and offers of materials to contribute.
correctionBody: Public history improves when readers help. If a date, name, or fact here is wrong or incomplete, email the project with the page and the correction, and we will review it.
contributeBody: If your family or organization holds photographs, documents, or recollections connected to Islip's communities — in any language — we would like to hear from you. Please reach out before sending anything, so we can discuss handling and rights.
